title: Starchy Feast
description: A hearty dish made with feast and starch, perfect for a comforting meal. This recipe is easy to make and requires minimal ingredients.

ingredients.name: starch
ingredients.notes: any type of starch, e.g. potatoes, rice, or bread

instructions: Mix the cooked starch with the feast in a large bowl.
Add the melted buttery spread to the starch and feast mixture.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for 20 minutes.
